company.heroSubtext: Premium textile dyeing, processing, and manufacturing from Telangana — built for global quality, consistency, and scale.
company.about: Vaaman Texprint Private Limited is a leading textile processing and manufacturing company based in Telangana, India, specializing in dyeing and processing of various fabric categories including cotton, polyester blends, viscose, lyocell, and cotton lycra.
company.background: The company began with cotton–polyester processing and expanded systematically into multiple fabric categories.
company.vision: To satisfy customers and meet global standards with superior quality and on-time delivery.

contact.addressDisplay: Vaaman Texprint Private Limited, 3-96, Sy No. 171/A, Chinnaravirala, Hayathnagar, Rangareddy, Telangana – 501505

company.ctaHeading: Partner with a trusted textile manufacturing expert

whyChooseUs.title: Modern Infrastructure
whyChooseUs.description: Purpose-built production zones designed for flow, safety, and repeatable quality.

whyChooseUs.title: Advanced Textile Machinery
whyChooseUs.description: Industrial lines engineered for singeing, mercerizing, padding, stenters, printing, and finishing.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Assurance
whyChooseUs.description: Measured checks for shade integrity, hand-feel, dimensional stability, and defect prevention.

whyChooseUs.title: Timely Delivery
whyChooseUs.description: Planning and execution aligned to dispatch commitments — without compromising standards.

whyChooseUs.title: Global Standard Processing
whyChooseUs.description: Processes tuned for consistency, fastness, and performance demanded by export programs.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Manufacturing Team
whyChooseUs.description: Operators and technical leadership with deep textile manufacturing expertise across fabric categories.

homeProductPreviews.title: Cotton Fabric Processing
homeProductPreviews.description: Preparation through finishing tuned for natural fibre behaviour and premium shade depth.

homeProductPreviews.title: Polyester Cotton Processing
homeProductPreviews.description: Blend-aware treatments designed for durability, stable hand-feel, and uniform dye uptake.

homeProductPreviews.title: Viscose Fabric Processing
homeProductPreviews.description: Careful handling for regenerated fibres with moisture-aware processing discipline.

homeProductPreviews.title: Lyocell Processing
homeProductPreviews.description: Precision programmes built for clean surfaces, refined hand-feel, and elevated colour clarity.

homeProductPreviews.title: Cotton Lycra Processing
homeProductPreviews.description: Stretch-aware processing engineered to protect recovery, seams, surface appearance, and uniform colour.

homeProductPreviews.title: Dyeing & Finishing
homeProductPreviews.description: Repeatable colour pipelines with finishing built for end-use performance and consistent fastness.

homeProductPreviews.title: Textile Printing
homeProductPreviews.description: Rotary workflows for sharp definition, fine repeats, and production-scale reliability.

homeProductPreviews.title: Industrial Fabric Processing
homeProductPreviews.description: Processing pathways aligned to technical specifications, stability, and downstream performance.
